classifications.phrase: committed to returning inflation to the 2–3 per cent range
further increases are likely to be required over the period ahead
inflation in Australia is too high
the labour market is very tight
unemployment rate is around the lowest rate in almost 50 years
Wages growth is continuing to pick up
Boards priority is to return inflation to the 2–3 per cent range
The Board expects to increase interest rates further over the period ahead
Board remains resolute in its determination to return inflation to target

payload.rationale: The statement signals a hawkish stance across inflation and employment dimensions, with repeated commitments to further rate increases and strong language about returning inflation to target despite tight labour market conditions.
